transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00006, derived from source AUC-006) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-OPHTH-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person administration of a single clinician-supervised tetracaine drop to facilitate examination and slit-lamp-level findings (ciliary flush, expected fluorescein result); presentation layer de-anchored to patient/bystander-observable content only, with all examination and staining findings sealed into 10/11.

The single-use clinician-administered tetracaine drop from the source was NOT carried into 12_management_plan_node as a recommend-to-patient medication, since it is explicitly a clinician-only, single-administration diagnostic aid, not a treatment the AI Doctor should direct the patient to use — flagged to avoid the dangerous error of recommending patient self-administration of topical anaesthetic.
Vitals were clinician-measured in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered — omitted rather than fabricated as patient-reported readings.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible adult age (37) consistent with DIY woodworking and 'roommate present' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.
